title: Pitagna mod
description: Add a touch of innovation to Minecraft with Pitagna Mod! This compact mod allows you to craft a practical backpack using the exclusive Pitagna ingot. Simplify your exploration and discover a new way to organize your adventures
body:
This small but impactful mod introduces a craftable backpack with 9 slots with gui(18 slots in 1.1.0.1), perfect for expanding your inventory in Minecraft. The backpack is created using the leather,the chest and the new Pitagna ingot, offering a unique crafting experience. Whether you're exploring vast biomes or organizing your items, the Pitagna Mod is designed to enhance your gameplay!Version 1.1.0 added a new spell system, press Y to open the interface. You will need Pitagna power to use the spells, which you gain by crafting Pitagna ingots (1 Pitagna power per ingot), and for 3 Pitagna power, you get an extra ingot, and for 2, you can summon a cat and in 2.1 you can switch to creative for 12 pitagna power for 5 seconds .(This mode is work in english and french)(lolcat is comming soon😹😹)
